rationale: Acceptance criteria are empty; diff contains only execution evidence (manifest/result). The substantive design write-up landed separately in commit e7149f17 (docs FEAT-006). Evidence shows a successful run targeting the bead's scope.

findings.summary: Diff under review contains only execution manifest and result JSON; the actual spec amendment is in result_rev e7149f17 (FEAT-006 doc update), not shown here.
Bead has no explicit <acceptance/> items — verdict is based on description scope (pick a/b/c, document rationale, decide on 22 malformed beads) and the recorded successful outcome.
